text:
Patient Relations | Contra Costa Health
Contra Costa Regional Medical Center wants to ensure that you receive high quality care and service and that your rights as a patient are respected.
To help you, CCRMC has a Patient Relations Services Coordinator who is the liaison between the patients, facility, and providers. The Coordinator can assist you in obtaining answers to your questions and filing complaints.
The Patient Relations Services Coordinator is available from 8 a.m. to 4:30 p.m., Monday through Friday, except holidays. The Coordinator's office is near the first floor Admissions Office of the Hospital, and their contact information is below:
Contact Patient Relations
Phone
: 925-370-5144
Fax
: 925-370-5992
The CCRMC operator at 925-370-5000 can also page the Patient Relations Coordinator
Contra Costa Health Plan Members also have the option of calling their Member Services office at 1-877-661-6230.
Please note that all billing concerns should be made in writing and mailed to:
Patient Accounting Department
Credit and Collections Supervisor
595 Center Avenue #300
Martinez, CA 94553
